name: Magical Broker
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔導闇商人</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>マジカル・ブローカー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: While you control a Continuous Spell/Trap, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Broker" once per turn.
mnst_eff: While you control a Continuous Spell/Trap, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Broker" once per turn.
eff: While you control a Continuous Spell/Trap, this card cannot be destroyed by battle or card effects. During your opponent's turn (Quick Effect): You can send 1 face-up Continuous Spell/Trap you control to the GY; draw 1 card. You can only use this effect of "Magical Broker" once per turn.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Cannot be destroyed by card effects
